ddls:
CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "org_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "org_url" TEXT /* URL of the organization's Crunchbase profile */,
  "headquarters_location" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the organization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the organization */,
  "cb_rank" INTEGER /* Crunchbase rank of the organization */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the organization was founded */,
  "total_funding_amount" REAL /* Total amount of funding raised by the organization */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the organization */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the organization's logo */,
  "last_funding_round_date" TEXT /* Date of the last funding round */,
  "ipo_status" TEXT /* Whether the organization is publicly traded (e.g., IPO, Private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "category_type" TEXT /* Type of category (e.g., Industry, Technology) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "org_categories" (
  "org_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization-category relationship */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_org_categories_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_org_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "org_locations" (
  "org_location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization-location relationship */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_org_locations_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_org_locations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_rounds" (
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding round */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization receiving funding */,
  "funding_amount" REAL /* Amount of funding raised */,
  "funding_date" TEXT /* Date of the funding round */,
  "funding_type" TEXT /* Type of funding (e.g., equity, debt) */,
  "funding_stage" TEXT /* Stage of the funding round (e.g., Seed, Series A) */,
  "investor_names" TEXT /* Names of investors involved in the funding round */,
  "funding_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the funding amount */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of the funding (e.g., Angel, Venture Capital) */,
  "pre_money_valuation" REAL /* Pre-money valuation of the organization */,
  "post_money_valuation" REAL /* Post-money valuation of the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_rounds_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investors" (
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investor */,
  "investor_name" TEXT /* Name of the investor */,
  "investor_type" TEXT /* Type of investor (e.g., Angel, Venture Capital) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investor's location */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the investor was founded */,
  "total_investment_amount" REAL /* Total amount of investments made by the investor */,
  "number_of_investments" INTEGER /* Number of investments made by the investor */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the investor's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "org_investors" (
  "org_investor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization-investor relationship */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization */,
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_investor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_org_investors_investor_id FOREIGN KEY ("investor_id") REFERENCES investors ("investor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_org_investors_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_keys" (
  "api_key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API key */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key string */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the API key */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the API key was created */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Date the API key expires */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the API key (e.g., active, revoked) */,
  "last_used_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the API key was last used */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the API key has been used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_key_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_keys_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research report */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization the report is about */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_author" TEXT /* Author of the report */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date the report was published */,
  "report_url" TEXT /* URL of the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Market Analysis, Competitive Landscape) */,
  "page_count" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the report */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report file in bytes */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the report has been downloaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_reports_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "user_pref_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "theme" TEXT /* Theme preference (e.g., light, dark) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language preference */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone preference */,
  "notification_prefs" TEXT /* Notification preferences (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "dashboard_layout" TEXT /* Preferred layout of the dashboard */,
  "report_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of receiving reports (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "custom_fields" TEXT /* JSON field for storing custom user preferences */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_pref_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
